name: HWR_ESS_SUB_JOB
description: This is the table to save the info of sub job from each running ess job

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the process table.

columns.Name: SUB_JOB_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of the sub job

columns.Name: JOB_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: The parent job ID of the sub job

columns.Name: PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: The key-value of the job parameters

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the sub job - in progress, completed, or failed

columns.Name: RESULT
columns.Comments: This is the result of the job execution.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date that the sub job starts

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The end date for the sub job

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_5
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_5. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
